name: dwi2response
description: Estimate response function(s) for spherical deconvolution
author: Robert E. Smith (robert.smith@florey.edu.au) & Thijs Dhollander (thijs.dhollander@gmail.com)

inputs.name: algorithm
inputs.description: algorithm to be used to complete the script operation.

inputs.name: dwi
inputs.description: the input diffusion-weighted image.

inputs.name: out
inputs.description: the output denoised DWI image.

inputs.name: grad
inputs.description: Provide the diffusion gradient table in MRtrix format

inputs.name: fslgrad
inputs.description: Provide the diffusion gradient table in FSL bvecs/bvals format

type.name: fslgrad
type.description: Provide the diffusion-weighted gradient scheme used in the acquisition in FSL bvecs/bvals format files. If a diffusion gradient scheme is present in the input image header, the data provided with this option will be instead used.

inputs.name: bvecs
inputs.description: Provide the diffusion-weighted gradient scheme used in the acquisition in FSL bvecs/bvals format files. If a diffusion gradient scheme is present in the input image header, the data provided with this option will be instead used.

inputs.name: bvals
inputs.description: Provide the diffusion-weighted gradient scheme used in the acquisition in FSL bvecs/bvals format files. If a diffusion gradient scheme is present in the input image header, the data provided with this option will be instead used.

inputs.name: mask
inputs.description: Only process voxels within the specified binary brain mask image.

inputs.name: voxels
inputs.description: Output an image showing the final voxel selection(s)

inputs.name: shells
inputs.description: b-value(s) to use in response function estimation (comma-separated list in case of multiple b-values, b=0 must be included explicitly)

inputs.name: lmax
inputs.description: maximum harmonic degree(s) for response function estimation (comma-separated list in case of multiple b-values).

inputs.name: info
inputs.description: display information messages.

inputs.name: quiet
inputs.description: do not display information messages or progress status; alternatively, this can be achieved by setting the MRTRIX_QUIET environment variable to a non-empty string.

inputs.name: debug
inputs.description: display debugging messages.

inputs.name: force
inputs.description: force overwrite of output files (caution: using the same file as input and output might cause unexpected behaviour).

inputs.name: nthreads
inputs.description: use this number of threads in multi-threaded applications (set to 0 to disable multi-threading).

inputs.name: config
inputs.description: temporarily set the value of an MRtrix config file entry.

type.name: config
type.description: temporarily set the value of an MRtrix config file entry.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: temporarily set the value of an MRtrix config file entry.

inputs.name: value
inputs.description: temporarily set the value of an MRtrix config file entry.

inputs.name: help
inputs.description: display this information page and exit.

inputs.name: version
inputs.description: display version information and exit.
